file: Paniagua - 2021 - Sulfonic Mesostructured SBA-15 Silicas for the Solvent-Free Production of Bio-Jet Fuel Precursors vi.txt

experiments.description: 在无溶剂条件下，使用丙基磺酸功能化的介孔SBA-15硅材料（Pr-SBA-15）催化生物质衍生的乙酰丙酸进行自身羟醛二聚反应，生成生物航空燃料前体。通过响应面方法优化了反应条件（温度、时间、催化剂负载量），在145°C、0.15 g催化剂、24小时、无溶剂的条件下，实现了58.4%的二聚产物收率。
experiments.text_snippet: Sulfonic acid-functionalized mesostructured silicas have been evaluated in the solvent-free aldol dimerization of biomass-derived levulinic acid into bio-jet fuel precursors... Reaction conditions (temperature, time, and catalyst loading) have been optimized for propylsulfonic acid-functionalized mesostructured silica (Pr-SBA-15) by means of a response surface methodology, leading to a maximum yield to levulinic acid dimerization products of 58.4% (145 °C, 0.15 g of catalyst, 24 h, no solvent).

Catalyst stability.original: Partial deactivation after 3 cycles due to organic deposits and sulfur loss; activity significantly recovered after mild acid washing
